summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cart and checkout functionality for Zikra e-commerce. All core cart features work correctly: add to cart, view cart, quantity controls, remove items, checkout form, order creation via API, and order confirmation page. Backend APIs (10/10 tests passed) and frontend UI flows are functional.

code_issues.issue: Missing import for 'toast' - was using toast() without import, would cause error on product not found

critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx line 29 was using toast() without import - FIXED by adding 'import { toast } from '../hooks/use-toast'
seed_data_creation: Created test orders with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart and checkout functionality is fully working. Key test data-testids: cart-button, cart-count, cart-item-{id}, quantity-increase-{id}, quantity-decrease-{id}, remove-item-{id}, proceed-checkout-button, place-order-button, order-confirmation. Payment is MOCKED - orders create but payment is simulated. Products available: prod-002 (₺35,000), 2e3a5187-e9f1-4d4e-8abe-4d59dcc01b01 (₺0), c51b3cd6-cc3c-42b5-bea8-747450bd5592 (₺10). Note: localStorage persistence works correctly in real browsers; Playwright automation creates fresh browser contexts per test run which doesn't persist localStorage between runs.

features_tested.add_to_cart: PASS - Product added to cart from ProductDetail page, cart count badge updates in header
features_tested.view_cart: PASS - Cart page displays items with correct name, price, quantity, category
features_tested.quantity_controls: PASS - Increase/decrease buttons work correctly, quantity updates in real-time
features_tested.remove_item: PASS - Remove button removes item, empty cart state shown with 'Sepetiniz Bos' message
features_tested.checkout_form: PASS - All form fields work (full_name, address, city, state, zip_code, phone)
features_tested.order_creation: PASS - Order created via POST /api/orders, persisted in MongoDB
features_tested.order_confirmation: PASS - Order confirmation page shows order number, status (Beklemede), total, products, shipping address
features_tested.empty_cart_handling: PASS - Shows 'Sepetiniz Bos' message and 'Alisverise Basla' button
features_tested.localStorage_persistence: PASS - Cart data saved to localStorage key 'zikra_cart'

mocked_api_note: Payment processing is MOCKED - POST /api/orders creates order but payment is simulated. Orders are created with status 'pending' and payment_status 'pending'.
